title: Li Auto Q1 2023 Earnings Preview
text: Li Auto was scheduled to announce Q1 earnings results on Wednesday, May 10th, before market open. The consensus EPS Estimate was $0.11 (+57.1% Y/Y) and the consensus Revenue Estimate was $2.7B (+78.8% Y/Y). Deutsche Bank analyst Edison Yu's team expected Li Auto to report revenue of RMB 17.7 billion yuan in the first quarter, with a gross margin of 20.7 percent and adjusted earnings per share of 0.40. This compared to the analyst consensus estimates of RMB 18.9 billion, 20.5 percent and 0.49, respectively. With sales near the low end of guidance, Li Auto's performance in the first quarter was expected to be somewhat mixed, but the outlook for delivery in the second quarter was expected to be robust. Li Auto delivered a record 52,584 vehicles in the first quarter, near the lower end of its previously provided guidance range of 52,000 to 55,000 vehicles. Vehicle margin was expected to increase by just 50 basis points sequentially. Li Auto remains the clear favorite in the group according to analysts.
